headline: FPDA Exercise Tests South China Sea Scenario for First Time
context: Five Power Defence Arrangements conducted Exercise Bersama Shield 2025 with 4,500 personnel including first South China Sea scenario.

cards.big: FPDA exercise with 4,500 troops tests South China Sea scenario first time
cards.sub: UK Australia NZ Singapore and Malaysia practiced maritime interdiction

cards.big: Exercise included 15 warships 45 aircraft and submarine detection operations
cards.sub: Largest FPDA exercise since 2019 with expanded cyber defence elements

cards.big: China Foreign Ministry protested exercise as provocative and destabilizing
cards.sub: Beijing issued formal complaint to all 5 participating nations

cards.big: Australia deployed 2 P-8A Poseidon maritime patrol aircraft from Darwin
cards.sub: Enhanced surveillance demonstrated interoperability for monitoring contested waters

cards.big: FPDA exercises test whether collective defence arrangements deter or provoke regional tensions
FPDA testing South China Sea scenarios for the first time signals a regional defence posture shift.
